raw_consumer_statement: XXXXSince October, I have been attempting to have unauthorized charges reversed after my account was compromised. During this breach, the following individualsXXXX XXXX, XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXwere added to my account without my knowledge, authorization, or consent. These additions were fraudulent and directly resulted in unauthorized transactions.XXXXUpon discovering this activity, I promptly notified Barclays and initiated fraud claims in accordance with your established procedures. Despite my timely notification and repeated follow-ups, the fraudulent charges have not been properly resolvedXXXXAfter conducting a detailed review of my account statements, I identified a recurring issue in which Barclays applied both a credit and a corresponding debit associated with the same disputed transactions. This accounting treatment effectively negated the credit and allowed the fraudulent charges to remain on my account, contrary to the purpose of the dispute process.XXXXHere are the transaction in
